# cobbler_system_group (Resource)

`cobbler_system_group` manages a Cobbler 4.0.0+ system group (a named collection of distros for bulk operations).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the group. Changing this forces a new resource.

### Optional

- `comment` (String) Free form text description.
- `items` (List of String) Names of the distros belonging to this group.
